title: Naphtaliy #5321
definition:
Naphtali = "wrestling"

 n pr m
 1) the 5th son of Jacob and the 2nd by Bilhah the handmaid of Rachel
 2) the tribe descended from Naphtali the son of Jacob

 n pr loc
 3) the territory assigned to the tribe of Naphtali
nasbUsage:
Definition: Naphtali = "wrestling"

 n pr m
 1) the 5th son of Jacob and the 2nd by Bilhah the handmaid of Rachel
 2) the tribe descended from Naphtali the son of Jacob

 n pr loc
 3) the territory assigned to the tribe of Naphtali

    NASB:  a son of Jacob, also his desc. and the district settled by them
